productDisplayName: Baggit Women Baaz Gang Black Belt
description: Style Note A belt is an essential detail to complete your ensemble and this belt from baggit is made for optimal style and durability. With a generous, adjustable Fit, cinch this fashionable belt over a silk dress or wrap it around those stylish skinnies! Product Details Narrow black belt Tang clasp on one end to offer a snug fit and to hold the belt in place with buttons on the other end to fold the extra part into a loop Holes to customise fit Material and Care Leatherette Use a brass polisher to maintain buckle shine Wipe surface with a clean, dry cloth to remove dust
